title: Peanut Chicken with Rice
description: A rich and flavorful dish blending nutty peanut butter with tangy, sweet, and spicy notes. It features a vibrant array of healthy vegetables including broccoli, carrots, peppers, and onions, topped with crunchy dry roasted peanuts, fresh cilantro, and a zest of lime.

ingredients.item: Kirkwood Fresh Chicken Breasts (sliced into 1/2-inch strips)

instructions: In a small saucepan, whisk together peanut butter, lime juice, 1 clove minced garlic, hot sauce, milk, honey, soy sauce, cinnamon, and crushed red pepper. Cook over medium heat until bubbling.
Slowly add water until the desired consistency is reached. Set aside.
Prepare rice according to package instructions.
In a large skillet over medium heat, heat 2 tablespoons of oil. Add chicken and cook for 6 minutes.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil, 2 cloves of garlic, broccoli, carrot, peppers, and onion. Sauté for 3 minutes.
Add the sweet peas and cook for another 3 minutes.
Add the peanut sauce and cucumber to the skillet. Toss to coat all ingredients evenly.
Serve the chicken and vegetables over the prepared rice. Sprinkle with roasted peanuts, lime zest, and garnish with fresh cilantro.
